ab: kalih, ray taew’an ’oka’ ila ka pinobae:aeh, So’o Sa’ila bae:iw ka pinobae:aeh.
ch: W:kalih，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: kalih, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ray katalekan hayza’ ’aehae’ naehan binbiniSitan ka pinobae:aeh, So: ’okay bae:iw ma’ kayzaeh la!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶米酒，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: ’aehae’ nanaw ’okik lal’oz, Sa’ila bae:iw roSa’ binbiniSitan naehan.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: yako ’am bae:iw ka pinobae:aeh, nimon hayza’ ay?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: hayza’ a, niSo’ koza’ kabae:iwen?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: yako ’am bae:iw roSa’ binbiniSitan ka pinobae:aeh, ki ’aehae’ pinotoy ka Si’Si’.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶米酒，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Si’Si’ hini, niSo’ ’am kano’ naehan kabae:iwen?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: yako ’am bae:iw ka ’oesizo:, nimon hayza’ ay?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: niya’om ’oesizo: Sitil’amet ila.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: yako ’am bae:iw ka kayba:en.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: So’o ’am bae:iw ’inak’ino’an ka kayba:en?
ch: W:你想要什麼樣子的衣服呢?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: yako ’am bae:iw ’ima ’itoSan ka kayba:en.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: hini ’aehae’ ’ima ngangilaehan ka kayba:en kayzaeh ay?
en: How about this red one?

ab: hayza’ ay ’aroma’ ’ima ’okik hingha’ ka rineme:?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: niya’om hayza’ ’ima bolalasan ki ’ima his’alan ka kayba:en.
ch: W:我們還有白色和藍色的衣服。
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: be:ay ’iyakin ’aehae’ ’ima his’alan ka kayba:en.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: kalih kaysa’an So’o rima’ rayno’? So’o rima’ homayaw ay?
ch: W:kalih你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: kalih, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ’oka’, ya:o rima’ tatilhael hi koko’ ma’an titibae:iw ka tatimae’.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: nakhini o , rohaenan So’o honasamez ay? ’am ki yako ma’onhael komSa:o’ ay?
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起晚餐嗎?
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: kayni’, yako ’am rima’ bae:iw ka kayba:en.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: nakhiza ya:o ’am tani ’iSo’on rima’.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: hini ’aehae’ binotoe’ ka por’oe’ koza’ rayhil?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: por’oe’ ’aehae’ binotoe’ Sam’iyaeh rayhil.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: hini ’aewpir koza’ rayhil?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: ’aewpir ’aehae’ tintin mato:ol rayhil.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: be:ay ’iyakin roSa’ binotoe’ ka por’oe’ ki ’aehae’ tintin ka ’aewpir.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
